eval.eval_method: within-train fit/OOS split; per-OOS-date cross-sectional Spearman rank-IC of CNN score vs 21d close-to-close forward return; paired t-test of per-date IC vs baseline
eval.turnover_penalty: monthly top-8 name turnover = 0.648; implied cost drag ~2.33%/yr

root_cause: 3A GAF image-CNN OOS rank-IC is significantly BELOW the 126d momentum baseline. The GASF/GADF encoding spreads a 63-bar window into a 63x63 image whose dominant signal (the angular sum field) is a smooth re-encoding of cumulative return; a 2-conv CNN at this config did not extract more cross-sectional rank signal than the momentum factor it is built from.
notes: Phase 3 image-CNN attempt. Within-train fit/OOS split — no validation/sealed data read. Date-subsampled (stride 4) for RAM.
